files.text:
FROM postgres:16.4
ENV POSTGRES_PASSWORD=hunter2
USER 999
EXPOSE 5432

FROM node:22.11.0-alpine
ARG NPM_TOKEN=npm_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm ci
USER node
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

FROM node:22.11.0-alpine
ARG NPM_TOKEN
WORKDIR /app
COPY package*.json ./
RUN --mount=type=secret,id=npm_token \
  NPM_TOKEN="$(cat /run/secrets/npm_token)" npm ci
USER node
CMD ["node", "server.js"]

FROM node:22.11.0-alpine
ENV PORT=3000
WORKDIR /app
COPY . .
USER node
CMD ["node", "server.js"]
